Title: The Great Gatsby
Author: F. Scott Fitzgerald
My Review: A masterpiece of American literature. The writing is beautiful and the characters are compelling.
Private Notes: One of the best books ever written

Title: To Kill a Mockingbird
Author: Harper Lee
My Review: A powerful exploration of racism and morality in the American South.

Author: George Orwell
My Review: Haunting and thought-provoking. A must-read dystopian novel.

Title: The Hobbit
Author: J.R.R. Tolkien
My Review: Epic adventure with wonderful worldbuilding. Tolkien's imagination is incredible.
Private Notes: One of the best fantasy books
Original Title: The Hobbit or There and Back Again

Title: Dune
Author: Frank Herbert
My Review: Dense and complex but fascinating. The political intrigue is compelling.

Title: The Catcher in the Rye
Author: J.D. Salinger
My Review: Good coming-of-age story but the protagonist can be annoying.
